creator: dbader@eece.unm.edu
text:
The port archivers/pkzip fails to build on machines that do not
already have Linux emulation, since the Makefile has a RUN_DEPENDS,
but no BUILD_DEPENDS, and the distfile is a Linux .exe ELF binary (and
not a standard .tar.gz file)

Fix: 

-- 
David A. Bader                                  Office: 505-277-6724
Assistant Professor and Regents' Lecturer       FAX:    505-277-1439

University of New Mexico                         dbader@eece.unm.edu
Albuquerque, NM  87131               http://www.eece.unm.edu/~dbader--bws25juDH1Oy11mZblt7OlTXTTeNbej1gWqlkv93eVpkPZWT

Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="pkzip.patch"
